name: docker-cleanup
description: Remove stopped containers, dangling images, unused volumes, and build cache to reclaim Docker disk space.
intent_triggers: 刪掉沒用的 Docker 容器
clean up docker images and containers

target.description: What to clean: all, containers, images, volumes, cache

dry_run.description: Show what would be removed without actually removing

older_than.description: Only remove resources older than this duration (e.g. 24h, 7d)

examples.intent: 清理所有沒用的 Docker 資源
dry run to see what would be deleted
只刪掉 7 天前的 image

error_codes.E002: Insufficient permissions — try running with sudo
error_codes.E003: Cannot remove image in use by running container
